title: Corrupted Nether
description: Adds a Corrupted Forest biome to The Nether
body:
# Corrupted Nether
Corrupted Nether is a mod which adds a new Corrupted Forest biome to The Nether based off of Terraria's corruption changed to fit into the style of the other Nether Update biomes

![Corrupted Nether Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10f1550a4cbe58a09844902525b046c4321d6d4b.png)

## Includes
-  Fuchsite, a stone type and its polished and brick variants
-  Corrupted Wood, a new purple wood variant
-  Corrupted Fire, like soul fire but ontop of corrupted blocks
